name: Sevastopol (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the red field of the historic Soviet-era city arms and the city's status as a 'hero city' twice over

description: A red field with the coat of arms of Sevastopol centred — featuring the city's Hero City Gold Star medal, the bastion silhouette and laurel ornament.
history: Sevastopol is a city of special status; its flag and arms recall its naval-fortress role and twice 'Hero City' designation (for the sieges of 1854–55 and 1941–42). The city is internationally recognised as part of Ukraine but has been administered by Russia since the 2014 occupation.

features.role: arms of Sevastopol — Hero City emblem
